questionHtml: Distinguish between the distribution of D. tigrina and that of D. coronata.
markschemeHtml:
a. D. tigrina lives higher in the tree than D. coronata;

b. D. coronata occupies a greater area/height range than D. tigrina;

c. D. tigrina found in the outer regions and D. coronata found on the inside;

Accept vice-versa.

meta.title: Distinguish between the distribution of D. tigrina and that of D. coronata.
breadcrumbLabels: B4.2.13. Competitive exclusion and the uniqueness of ecological niches
